mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 = '未读'
SELECT 消息类型 AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 != '已删除' GROUP BY 消息类型
SELECT 消息类型 AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 = '未读' GROUP BY 消息类型
SELECT 消息优先级 AS priority, COUNT(*) AS count FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 != '已删除' GROUP BY 消息优先级
SELECT 消息状态 AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 != '已删除' GROUP BY 消息状态
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 != '已删除'
SELECT 消息编号 FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 = '未读'
SELECT 消息编号 FROM MESSAGE WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 != '已删除'
mapper.update: UPDATE MESSAGE SET 消息状态 = '已读', 已读时间 = NOW() WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 = '未读'
UPDATE MESSAGE SET 消息状态 = '已删除', 删除时间 = NOW() WHERE 接收人编码 = #{receiverId} AND 消息状态 != '已删除'
